scripts.mionlink: npm run mionlink:nextjs && npm run mionlink:nuxt
scripts.mionlink:nextjs: cd nextjs/16 && npm link @mionjs/client @mionjs/core @mionjs/router @mionjs/platform-vercel @mionjs/platform-node @mionjs/platform-bun @mionjs/drizzle @mionjs/type-formats @mionjs/devtools && node ../../scripts/copy-mion-packages.js nextjs/16 client core type-formats
